title: seed_input
description: Schema for the JSON payload produced by the active template's prompts/seed.md and consumed by bin/seed.py via --seed-json. Per v018 Q1 + v020 Q2, the payload carries main-spec files plus an optional sub_specs[] array of per-template SubSpecPayload entries for atomic multi-tree seed.

template.description: User-chosen template value from the pre-seed dialogue: a built-in name ('livespec', 'minimal') or a path to a custom template directory.

intent.description: Verbatim user intent text from the pre-seed dialogue's seed-intent question. Captured into the auto-emitted history/v001/proposed_changes/seed.md proposed-change file.

files.description: Main-spec files to write. Each entry's path is relative to the project root and must be one of the active template's declared spec-file paths.

path.description: Relative path under the project root.

sub_specs.description: Sub-spec trees to emit atomically alongside the main spec. Empty list when the user answered 'no' to the pre-seed 'ships own livespec templates' question (the default), or when the active template does not declare sub-spec-emission capability.

template_name.description: Sub-spec directory name under .claude-plugin/specification-templates/<template_name>/ — 'livespec', 'minimal', or any user-shipped template name.

path.description: Relative path under the project root, conventionally SPECIFICATION/templates/<template_name>/<spec-file>.
